createdAt.description: Timestamp for when the row was created.

index.description: Index of the row within the table.

name.description: The display name of the row, based on its identifying column.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp for when the row was last modified.

additionalProperties.description: All values that a row cell can contain.

oneOf.description: A Superhuman Docs result or entity expressed as a primitive type, or array of primitive types.
A Superhuman Docs result or entity expressed as a primitive type.
A Superhuman Docs result or entity expressed as a primitive type.

items.description: A Superhuman Docs result or entity expressed as a primitive type.

oneOf.description: A cell value that contains rich structured data.
A value that contains rich structured data. Cell values are composed of these values or arrays of these values.
A Superhuman Docs result or entity expressed as a primitive type.

allOf.description: Base type for a JSON-LD (Linked Data) object.

@context.description: A url describing the schema context for this object, typically "http://schema.org/".

@type.description: A schema.org identifier for the object.

additionalType.description: An identifier of additional type info specific to Superhuman Docs that may not be present in a schema.org taxonomy,

amount.description: A numeric monetary amount as a string or number.

oneOf.description: A monetary value with its associated currency code.
